message:
fix(runtime): Add unique exception_id to ExceptionClass for identity comparison

- ExceptionClass instances now get unique exception_id from getCurrentExceptionId()
- Added cross-type exception identity comparison in pyIdentical()
- This enables assertIs(e.__cause__, cause) to work when cause is an
  ExceptionClass instance and e.__cause__ is a PyException

The identity comparison works by checking if both objects have the same
exception_id, regardless of their concrete types.
